title: Tuda Grass Direct Bodrum Artificial Grass 40mm Pile Height - 1m x 1m (3ft3 x 3ft3)
features: Luxurious Thickness of 40mm for Supreme Comfort
description: Product Description Introducing Bodrum Artificial Grass – Soft, Natural & Budget-Friendly Bring the beauty of a lush, green lawn to your outdoor space with Bodrum Artificial Grass , part of our budget-friendly range. Featuring a blend of vibrant greens and textured curly fibres , it creates a natural-looking lawn that complements any garden, patio, or balcony. Experience the comfort of walking on a soft, 40mm pile that retains its upright structure and plushness over time. Made with premium-quality yarn, Bodrum offers durability, resilience, and low-maintenance convenience , giving you a picture-perfect lawn all year round. Ideal for family gardens, children’s play areas, pet-friendly spaces, or relaxing outdoors , Bodrum Artificial Grass transforms your backyard into a clean, inviting, and practical green space without the hassle of mowing, watering, or fertilizing. Important Colour Information: Please note: The 2m and 4m widths may differ slightly in shade from the 1m, 3m, and 5m widths due to separate manufacturing batches. For best colour consistency, we recommend ordering all required widths in a single order. This ensures a uniform, visually appealing lawn across your entire outdoor space. Key Product Features Natural Looking Our artificial grass looks and feels every bit as great as the real thing but comes with all of the other associated benefits of artificial turf. A win-win for you. UV Protection All of our ranges of artificial grasses have fantastic UV protection – they don’t fade in sunlight and stay green all year round. High Quality Backing This grass benefits from quality backing which is essential to the durability and long-term appearance of your artificial grass. Pet & Child Friendly Our artificial lawns are ideal for all pets. Our fake grass is easily cleaned using a garden hose or even a good downpour will do the trick. This lead-free artificial grass is perfect for your precious little ones to enjoy just as much as you will. Looks Great All Seasons With it’s all year-round consistent appearance our quality artificial grass will look as great in the bright, warm summer as it will in the cold winter. No More Muddy Footprints Tired of mopping the floor or cleaning the carpet as a result of muddy footprints? Eliminate this problem forever with our Artificial Grass. Easy To Install Our artificial grass is simple to cut and install yourself, allowing you to save even more whilst still ensuring perfect results. Low Maintenance Indulge in a flawless lawn year-round with our low-maintenance artificial grass. Spend less time on upkeep and more time savouring your beautiful surroundings. Tuda Grass Direct Transform your outdoor space with confidence using Tuda's high-quality products. Enhance your landscape with our durable and stylish options

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: No Sand Fill Required, Pet Friendly, Thickness 40mm, UV Stabilised
